product: Supervisor Agent now supports Unity Catalog functions and external MCP servers
tagline: Use Supervisor Agent to create a supervisor system that coordinates Genie Spaces, agent endpoints, and tools to work together to complete complex tasks across different, specialized domains.
what_it_does: Use Supervisor Agent to create a supervisor system that coordinates Genie Spaces, agent endpoints, and tools to work together to complete complex tasks across different, specialized domains. You can now provide the supervisor system tools like Unity Catalog functions and external MCP servers. The supervisor agent will delegate relevant tasks to those tools.
why_it_matters: You can improve their coordination based on natural language feedback from your subject matter experts.
